examples: The terms isopach and isopach map are incorrectly used interchangeably to describe isochores and isochore maps.
Authors draw and analyze depositional trend and strike sections and sandstone isopach maps by collecting a lot of bores.
Commonly, the isopachs, or contours that make up an isopach map, display the stratigraphic thickness of a rock unit as opposed to the true vertical thickness.
